summary: Iteration 2 end-to-end testing: 32/32 backend tests PASS (16 existing + 16 new). Frontend Playwright covers all critical flows: admin user CRUD, role-based sidebar, /utilizadores admin guard, problema detail tabs (followups/anexos/audit), assign dropdown, attachment upload, audit log display. All listed feature acceptance criteria are met. One minor testid-name discrepancy and a native browser date picker noted as low-priority.

issues: 'Data prevista de resolução' uses native browser <input type='date'> (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of shadcn Calendar / PT-PT format. Low priority.
Pre-existing Radix DialogContent missing Description warning still applies to new ProblemaDetailSheet (a11y warning, non-blocking).

action_items: (Low) Rename testid in CreateProblemaSheet from 'form-atribuido' to 'assign-select' to match the spec (data-testid contract documented in review_request). Detail sheet correctly uses 'assign-select'.
(Low) Replace native date input with shadcn Calendar + dd/mm/yyyy formatting for PT-PT consistency.
(Optional) Add aria-describedby/DialogDescription to ProblemaDetailSheet to silence Radix warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Permissions correctly enforced: require_admin used on /users POST/PATCH/DELETE; consultor PATCH on problema he didn't create returns 403; DELETE /api/problemas only for admin. Verified via tests.
Audit logs are written for criou, atualizou, atribuiu, ponto_situacao, anexo_adicionado, anexo_removido — comprehensive trail.
Object storage put/get use bearer key with 403-retry — robust against key expiry.
Email side-effects use asyncio.to_thread and catch exceptions silently — safe; Resend sandbox onboarding@resend.dev configured.
GET /api/users is accessible to any authenticated user (needed for assign dropdown) — intentional and correct.

/api/attachments/{aid}/download supports auth via query param 'auth' BUT does NOT actually verify the user via that token (no user lookup performed) — minor: any valid JWT passes; acceptable for inline <a> downloads but worth noting.
/api/problemas/export/csv pre-fetches users for atribuido_a_id lookup — efficient; PT-PT 'Atribuído' header confirmed.
delete_problema soft-deletes attachments via is_deleted flag — preserves storage objects (good for forensic recovery).
JWT_SECRET, MONGO_URL, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY all sourced from env — no hardcoded secrets.
Still missing brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (carried over from iteration 1).
test_credentials: admin@farmacias.pt / admin123 (seeded). Test consultor accounts created and cleaned up during tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed problemas and test_consultor_* users; session-scoped autouse cleanup fixture removes them after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two test files now: /app/backend/tests/test_problemas_api.py (16 tests, original CRUD/auth/follow-ups/stats/CSV) and /app/backend/tests/test_users_attachments.py (16 tests, users/permissions/assignment/attachments/audit/CSV-assignee). Both auto-clean. Frontend testids verified working: nav-utilizadores, utilizadores-page, new-user-btn, user-row-{id}, delete-user-{id}, user-form-{name|email|password|role|submit}, tab-followups/anexos/audit, attachment-input, audit-list/entry, delete-problema-btn. NOTE: Create sheet uses 'form-atribuido' (NOT 'assign-select' as spec states); detail sheet correctly uses 'assign-select'. Object storage works end-to-end with current EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
verified_flows: /utilizadores lists admin + consultor; new user dialog creates user; delete buttons only for non-self
Consultor login; sidebar hides Utilizadores; /utilizadores redirects to /
Create problema: 'Atribuir a' dropdown (was text field) — works
Problema detail sheet has 3 tabs (followups/anexos/audit) with content
Audit list shows entries with author + date (criou, atribuiu observed)
Anexos tab shows upload input + empty state
Backend: POST /users by consultor -> 403; PATCH /problemas not-creator by consultor -> 403; DELETE /problemas by consultor -> 403
Backend: Attachment upload -> list -> download -> delete (admin) end-to-end
Backend: CSV export includes 'Atribuído' header and assignee name
Backend: Email notify_assigned called on create-with-assignment and patch-assignment (no crash, audit 'atribuiu' present)
